# Check current positions
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("ASCII around rows 28-50, cols 35-55:")
for r in range(28, 51):
    print(f"  {r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][35:56]}")

print("\nKey object positions:")
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if node['color'] in ['c', 'Y'] and min(rows) > 0:
        print(f"  color={node['color']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}] pixels={node['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
